steps.title: Distribute to both terms
steps.content:
Multiply $14$ by each term inside the parentheses, not just by $x$:
$$
14(x+13)=14x+14(13)
$$

steps.title: Multiply the constant
steps.content: Now compute the constant term: $$ 14(13)=182 $$ So the equivalent expression is $14x+182$. The other answer choices do not correctly distribute $14$ to the constant term. The answer is B.
